title: Axis Institutions
description: A reference-dependent series where one centered clerk and one strict production-design grammar move through four fictional public institutions.
creative_direction: Image 01 establishes the central-axis composition, pastel palette, flat lighting, deadpan clerk identity, and dollhouse-like institutional staging. Images 02-04 use it as reference while changing the room program from lobby to clinic, rail hall, and launch control.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Axis Institutions
en.description: A reference-dependent series where one centered clerk and one strict production-design grammar move through four fictional public institutions.

zh-CN.title: 中轴机构系列
zh-CN.description: 一组参考依赖系列: 同一名居中职员和同一套严格布景语法迁移到四个虚构公共机构。
